sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, timestamp TIMESTAMP, interval_col INTERVAL);

INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, timestamp, interval_col) VALUES (1, 3.5, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00', INTERVAL '5' HOUR), (2, NULL, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 01:00:00', INTERVAL '2' HOUR), (3, 7.2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-03 14:00:00', INTERVAL '10' HOUR), (4, 5.5, NULL, INTERVAL '1' HOUR), (5, 0.0, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-05 18:00:00', NULL);

SELECT id, mad(value + VALUE) AS mad_value FROM (SELECT value, (SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS VALUE FROM test_table) AS subquery WHERE VALUE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING mad(value + VALUE) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, mad((value + interval_col)::FLOAT) AS mad_interval FROM test_table WHERE timestamp IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value > 0) GROUP BY id HAVING mad((value + interval_col)::FLOAT) > 2;
SELECT id, mad((CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE value END) + (timestamp + interval_col)) AS mad_mixed_type FROM test_table GROUP BY id ORDER BY mad_mixed_type DESC;

SELECT id, mad(ABS(value - (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) + (timestamp + interval_col)) AS mad_complex FROM test_table WHERE interval_col IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING mad_complex > 3.0;

SELECT id, mad(value + VALUE) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY value) AS mad_partitioned FROM (SELECT value, (SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS VALUE FROM test_table) AS subquery ORDER BY mad_partitioned DESC;
